texto: While they argued, the pain blazed on. My blood boiled in my veins. Why was I doing this? Was he worth all of this pain? Why should I care if he lived or died?"I love him." The words came out as a whisper, but they seemed to diminish the heat. I felt stronger and more sure of myself.

texto: I closed my eyes and let a wave of heat pass over me, tingling right down into my fingertips. texto: I forced myself to breathe deeply; perhaps they would have vanished.
